harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.dot_distinguishing_contract: multi-lane cases include mixed-sign products and products outside int16 range so the oracle distinguishes true widening dot-reduce from add-only, mul-only/no-seed, non-widening, and wrong sign-extension behavior
harness.dot_reduction_contract: signed i16*i16 widening products contribute to the i32 scalar seed through a horizontal dot-reduction
harness.scalar_result_contract: only out[0] is written and tail/non-scalar output slots preserve sentinels

widening_dot_reduction_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv widening dot-reduction body/config/runtime facts
widening_dot_reduction_boundary.empty_count_behavior: runtime loop skipped after seed store; tail/non-scalar output sentinels preserved
widening_dot_reduction_boundary.source: typed tcrv_rvv.widening_dot_reduce body/config/runtime facts -> contraction route-family plan -> target-owned dot-reduction validator -> neutral EmitC materializer -> generated RVV C artifact
target_validator_consumed_facts: route operand binding plan and exact binding summary
setvl/VL control and scalar store VL
